channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [MAXGROW] Maxgrow India Ltd Announces Q3 Results & Key Appointments in Board Meeting
item.description:
Maxgrow India Ltd announced the outcome of its Board Meeting held on April 03, 2026. The company approved the un-audited Standalone & Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025. Mr. Akshay Kene was appointed as the Company Secretary and Compliance Officer. M/s. Abhay Kumar Pal & Co., Practicing Company Secretary was appointed as Secretarial Auditors. The meeting was conducted in accordance with the SEBI LODR and Ind AS.

  • Maxgrow India Ltd announced Q3 results for the period ended December 31, 2025.
  • Company Secretary and Compliance Officer appointed.
  • Secretarial Auditors appointed for the company.
  • Financial results reviewed by the Audit Committee.
  • Prepared in accordance with the Ind AS as prescribed under the Companies Act, 2013.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Maxgrow India Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [MAXGROW] Maxgrow India Ltd: Q3 & Nine Months Ended December 31, 2025 Financial Results Approved, New Company Secretary & Secretarial Auditors Appointed
item.description:
Maxgrow India Ltd announced the outcome of its Board Meeting held on April 03, 2026. The Board approved the un-audited Standalone & Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025. The company has appointed Mr. Akshay Kene as the Company Secretary and Compliance Officer and M/s. Abhay Kumar Pal & Co., Practicing Company Secretary as Secretarial Auditors.

  • Maxgrow India Ltd approved the un-audited Standalone & Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025.
  • Mr. Akshay Kene appointed as the Company Secretary and Compliance Officer of the company.
  • M/s. Abhay Kumar Pal & Co., Practicing Company Secretary appointed as Secretarial Auditors of the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Maxgrow India Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SHANGAR] Shangar Decor Ltd Appoints Darshil Hemendrakumar Shah and Konark Patel as Additional Directors
item.description:
Shangar Decor Ltd, a company specializing in wedding decor, theme decor, exhibitions, and religious & corporate events, has appointed Darshil Hemendrakumar Shah and Konark Patel as Additional Directors (Non-Executive Independent Directors) for a term of 5 consecutive years. The appointments are subject to shareholder approval within 3 months. Darshil Hemendrakumar Shah is a fellow member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India with over 10 years of experience in corporate secretarial and legal functions. Konark Patel is a law graduate with expertise in corporate compliance, project finance, and government subsidies. Neither director is related to any of the company's current directors and neither is debarred from holding the office of director by any SEBI order or any other such authority.

  • Shangar Decor Ltd appoints Darshil Hemendrakumar Shah as Additional Director
  • Shangar Decor Ltd appoints Konark Patel as Additional Director
  • Appointments are subject to shareholder approval within 3 months
  • Darshil Hemendrakumar Shah has over 10 years of experience in corporate secretarial and legal functions
  • Konark Patel is a law graduate with expertise in corporate compliance and project finance

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shangar Decor Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [ASTRAMICRO] Astra Microwave Products Ltd: Managing Director, Mr. S. Gurunatha Reddy, to Step Down on September 30, 2026
item.description:
Astra Microwave Products Ltd has announced that Mr. S. Gurunatha Reddy will cease to be the Managing Director of the company from the close of business hours on 30th September, 2026. He will continue as an Executive Director. There are no material reasons for his resignation other than those mentioned in his resignation letter.

  • Mr. S. Gurunatha Reddy to step down as Managing Director of Astra Microwave Products Ltd.
  • He will continue as an Executive Director of the company.
  • No material reasons for his resignation other than those mentioned in his resignation letter.
  • The change will be effective from the close of business hours on 30th September, 2026.
  • Mr. Reddy will join Astra Space Technologies Pvt Ltd as a Director subject to the approval of the Board.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ASTRA MICROWAVE PRODUCTS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [GSAUTO] GS Auto International Ltd Schedules Board Meeting to Discuss Rights Issue Terms
item.description:
GS Auto International Ltd has announced a board meeting scheduled for April 7, 2026, to consider and approve various matters related to a proposed rights issue. The Rights Issue Committee will discuss the specific terms of the issue, including the determination of the rights issue price, rights entitlement ratio, record date, and payment mechanism. The company is awaiting in-principle approval from the relevant stock exchanges and regulatory authorities.

  • GS Auto International Ltd has scheduled a board meeting for April 7, 2026, to discuss the terms of a proposed rights issue.
  • The Rights Issue Committee will consider various matters including the rights issue price, entitlement ratio, record date, and payment mechanism.
  • The company is awaiting in-principle approval from the relevant stock exchanges and regulatory authorities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: G.S.AUTO INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [BARONINF] Baron Infotech Ltd Shifts Registered Office to New Location in Hyderabad
item.description:
Baron Infotech Limited, a company under Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP), has announced the shifting of its Registered Office from Flat No 504, 5th Floor, Micasa Flora, Survey No. 131 to 141, Durga Enclave, Kompally, Secunderabad, Ranga Reddi TG - 500014 to Flat No 401, Esteem Diamond Building, near Sai Baba Temple Road, Dwarakapuri, Punjagutta, Hyderabad, Telangana, 500082, with effect from April 2, 2026.

  • Baron Infotech Ltd has shifted its Registered Office to a new location in Hyderabad.
  • The new Registered Office address is Flat No 401, Esteem Diamond Building, near Sai Baba Temple Road, Dwarakapuri, Punjagutta, Hyderabad, Telangana, 500082.
  • The shift will be effective from April 2, 2026.
  • The company is under Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP).
  • The previous Registered Office was located at Flat No 504, 5th Floor, Micasa Flora, Survey No. 131 to 141, Durga Enclave, Kompally, Secunderabad, Ranga Reddi TG - 500014.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BARON INFOTECH LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [KAARYAFSL] Kaarya Facilities and Services Ltd. Appoints Mr. Jitendra Rathod as CFO
item.description:
Kaarya Facilities and Services Ltd. has appointed Mr. Jitendra Rathod as the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) of the company with effect from 03rd April, 2026. Mr. Rathod, who has been associated with the company since 2010, brings over 15 years of extensive experience across operations, commercial functions, and financial management. He has grown within the organization through various leadership roles and has a deep understanding of the company’s financial and operational ecosystem.

  • Mr. Jitendra Rathod appointed as CFO of Kaarya Facilities and Services Ltd.
  • Mr. Rathod has over 15 years of experience in operations, commercial functions, and financial management.
  • He has grown within the organization and has a deep understanding of the company’s financial and operational ecosystem.
  • His appointment is expected to strengthen the company’s financial governance, operational efficiency, and strategic growth initiatives.
  • Mr. Rathod has been associated with the company since 2010 and brings extensive experience in budgeting, cost control, financial planning, vendor management, contract negotiations, and MIS reporting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kaarya Facilities and Services Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [ADISHAKTI] Promoter Pawan Kumar Mittal Discloses Share Acquisition in Adishakti Loha and Ispat Ltd for FY2026
item.description:
Pawan Kumar Mittal, promoter of Adishakti Loha and Ispat Ltd, has filed a disclosure under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, for the financial year ending March 31, 2026. The disclosure was made on behalf of all members of the Promoter and Promoter group and Persons acting in concert (PACs) to the BSE Limited. The disclosure states that during the financial year ending March 31, 2026, Mittal created an encumbrance/pledge on 1,412,525 shares, which is 11.75% of his total shareholding in the company. This disclosure is for information purposes only and does not indicate any change in the financial status of the company or its promoters.

  • Pawan Kumar Mittal, promoter of Adishakti Loha and Ispat Ltd, discloses share acquisition under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI Takeovers Regulations, 2011.
  • The disclosure was made for the financial year ending March 31, 2026.
  • Mittal created an encumbrance/pledge on 1,412,525 shares, which is 11.75% of his total shareholding in the company.
  • The disclosure was made on behalf of all members of the Promoter and Promoter group and Persons acting in concert (PACs) to the BSE Limited.
  • This disclosure does not indicate any change in the financial status of the company or its promoters.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Adishakti Loha and Ispat Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [RGRL] Retro Green Revolution to Acquire Up to 36% Stake in Sevenglow Lights Limited
item.description:
Retro Green Revolution Limited has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Sevenglow Lights Limited dated 25th March, 2026, for a proposed strategic investment. The MOU outlines the intention for Retro to acquire an initial equity stake of up to 36% in Sevenglow Lights Limited, with the potential to increase up to 100% in a phased manner. The investment is intended to support business expansion, strategic growth, and long-term value creation. The transaction is subject to due diligence, regulatory approvals, and execution of definitive agreements.

  • Retro Green Revolution Limited to acquire an initial equity stake of up to 36% in Sevenglow Lights Limited
  • The shareholding may be increased up to 100% in a phased manner
  • The investment is intended to support business expansion, strategic growth, and long-term value creation
  • The transaction is subject to due diligence, regulatory approvals, and execution of definitive agreements
  • Retro may assume management control, subject to applicable laws

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Retro Green Revolution Ltd | Category: MoU

item.title: [DSSL] Dynacons honoured with the Best Partner for Driving HPE & Nutanix Solution for the Year 2025 from Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) in Udaipur
item.description:
Dynacons Systems & Solutions Limited has been awarded the prestigious ‘Best Partner for Driving HPE & Nutanix Solution FY’25’ by Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) at the HPE Top Partner event. The award recognizes Dynacons’ outstanding performance, consistent execution excellence, and significant contribution in driving HPE and Nutanix solutions. This recognition highlights Dynacons’ strong partnership with HPE and its ability to deliver high-impact, future-ready IT solutions to enterprise customers.

  • Dynacons awarded as the Best Partner for Driving HPE & Nutanix Solution for the Year 2025 by HPE
  • Recognition highlights Dynacons’ strong partnership with HPE and its ability to deliver high-impact, future-ready IT solutions
  • Award presented at the HPE Top Partner event
  • Dynacons’ recognition reflects its continued commitment to aligning with HPE’s strategic priorities
  • Dynacons’ position as a trusted technology partner strengthened in India’s enterprise and public sector ecosystem

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DYNACONS SYSTEMS & SOLUTIONS LTD. | Category: Partnership
